title: Pop Collage
description: Une esthétique vibrante en techniques mixtes combinant un réalisme pictural avec du design graphique plat, de la typographie et du collage. Elle présente des traits de marqueur expressifs, des trames de demi-teintes, des bords de papier découpé et des blocs de couleurs audacieux sur papier texturé.
description_en: A vibrant mixed-media aesthetic combining painterly realism with flat graphic design, typography, and collage. It features expressive marker strokes, halftone patterns, cut-paper edges, and bold color blocks on textured paper.
description_fr: Une esthétique vibrante en techniques mixtes combinant un réalisme pictural avec du design graphique plat, de la typographie et du collage. Elle présente des traits de marqueur expressifs, des trames de demi-teintes, des bords de papier découpé et des blocs de couleurs audacieux sur papier texturé.
prompt: Mixed media digital illustration combining expressive painting, graphic design, typography, and paper collage aesthetics. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space as a canvas rule: no borders, no frames, no white margins, full bleed to all four corners. The visual execution seamlessly blends realistic, soft-lit painterly brushwork with flat, unlit geometric shapes and bold typographic elements scattered erratically across the composition. Employ thick, unrefined, sweeping black marker strokes for loose contours, providing stark contrast against the sharp, scissor-cut edges of overlapping collaged layers. The color science pairs {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} in flat, opaque graphic blocks against realistic tonal rendering, heavily accented by vibrant, saturated splashes of {{accent_color}}. Textural materiality is paramount, incorporating visible raw paper grain, canvas weave, dry brush strokes, and retro halftone dot patterns. Spatial dynamics and depth are achieved entirely through the 2D overlapping of torn paper, text snippets, and painted elements, strictly rejecting traditional 3D perspective in favor of a flat, editorial layout. Lighting on painted areas features soft, directional studio illumination, while graphic layers remain completely flat and unlit. Edges constantly alternate between feathered brush blending and crisp vector-cut silhouettes, creating a chaotic yet cohesive contemporary pop-art aesthetic. mixed-media, digital-collage, pop-art, editorial-illustration, expressive-brushstrokes, halftone-patterns, graphic-design, typography-overlay, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: Mixed media digital illustration combining expressive painting, graphic design, typography, and paper collage aesthetics. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. The visual execution seamlessly blends realistic, soft-lit painterly brushwork with flat, unlit geometric shapes and bold typographic elements scattered erratically across the composition. Employ thick, unrefined, sweeping black marker strokes for loose contours, providing stark contrast against the sharp, scissor-cut edges of overlapping collaged layers. The color science pairs {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} in flat, opaque graphic blocks against realistic tonal rendering, heavily accented by vibrant, saturated splashes of {{accent_color}}. Textural materiality is paramount, incorporating visible raw paper grain, canvas weave, dry brush strokes, and retro halftone dot patterns. Spatial dynamics and depth are achieved entirely through the 2D overlapping of torn paper, text snippets, and painted elements, strictly rejecting traditional 3D perspective in favor of a flat, editorial layout. Lighting on painted areas features soft, directional studio illumination, while graphic layers remain completely flat and unlit. Edges constantly alternate between feathered brush blending and crisp vector-cut silhouettes, intentionally overflowing where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame, interacting dynamically with the {{background_color}} backdrop. mixed-media, digital-collage, pop-art, editorial-illustration, expressive-brushstrokes, halftone-patterns, graphic-design, typography-overlay
background_prompt: A textured, abstract mixed-media background environment composed of layered graphic elements, torn paper, and expressive paint strokes. The scene blends flat geometric shapes in {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} with scattered typographic snippets and retro halftone dot patterns. Vibrant splashes of {{accent_color}} and thick, loose black marker lines create dynamic movement across visible paper grain and canvas weave, establishing a flat, editorial pop-art depth without traditional perspective.
background_prompt_removebg: A textured, abstract mixed-media background environment composed of layered graphic elements, torn paper, and expressive paint strokes. The scene blends flat geometric shapes in {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} with scattered typographic snippets and retro halftone dot patterns. Vibrant splashes of {{accent_color}} and thick, loose black marker lines create dynamic movement across visible paper grain and canvas weave, establishing a flat, editorial pop-art depth without traditional perspective. In the foreground, a loose, expressive black marker frame and torn paper borders overlay the scene, transitioning sharply into the flat {{background_color}} surface.
